primary.detail: Small scar cutting through tail of left eyebrow, creating a natural gap in brow hair. Roughly 4mm wide. Childhood injury look
primary.verification: Visible in every frame. If missing, character didn't lock

secondary.detail: Constellation of 3 small moles forming a triangle on left cheek near jaw. 2 dark brown, 1 lighter. Slightly raised, actual moles not beauty marks
secondary.verification: Visible in front and three-quarter views

tertiary.detail: Slight bump on nose bridge (dorsal hump). Nose is not straight in profile. Visible in profile and three-quarter views

locked_features.face: Olive skin, warm undertones, visible pores across nose and inner cheeks, under-eye circles (purple-blue, not concealed), natural mauve-pink lips slightly chapped
locked_features.hair: Dark brown, shoulder-length, wavy natural texture. Day-two state. Half pulled back with tortoiseshell claw clip, messy pieces falling around face. Baby hairs at temples. Natural, not colored (subtle darker roots)

expression_asymmetry.details: Left eyebrow raises higher during surprise. Right side of mouth opens slightly wider. Left eye opens wider (dominant eye). Right nostril flares more

default_styling.apparel: Oversized washed-out navy crewneck sweatshirt, collar stretched from years of wear, slides off one shoulder showing bare skin and thin black bra strap
accessories: Small gold hoop earrings (slightly mismatched sizes, one thicker gauge)
Thin gold chain necklace with tiny evil eye pendant
Faded overstretched hair tie on right wrist
default_styling.nails: Short natural nails, slightly uneven. Remnants of pale pink polish on thumb and ring finger only (grown out, mostly chipped off)

reference_images.notes: Add generated images here as they are approved

prompt_block.character_reference_instruction: Maintain EXACTLY: facial structure, warm olive skin tone, eyebrow scar on left brow (4mm gap in brow hair), 3-mole triangle on left jaw (2 dark, 1 lighter), nose bump (dorsal hump on bridge), eye shape and spacing, lip shape (mauve-pink, slightly chapped). Left eyebrow naturally higher than right. Expression asymmetry: left side dominant for brow raise, right side dominant for mouth and nostril
